name: walrus-harbor-mcp
description: MCP server for Walrus Harbor — ggdrive-style decentralized, Seal-encrypted storage on Walrus + Sui.
long_description: Harbor is ggdrive-style decentralized storage. This bundle exposes tools to list spaces, manage Seal-encrypted buckets, and upload/download files. All Seal encryption/decryption and Sui signing happens locally using your service private key, which never leaves your machine.

harbor_api_key.title: Harbor API Key
harbor_api_key.description: Your Harbor API key. Required for all Harbor API calls.

harbor_service_private_key.title: Service Private Key
harbor_service_private_key.description: Sui private key used locally for Seal encryption/decryption and signing. Never sent to any remote server. Required only for upload/download.

harbor_api_base_url.title: Harbor API Base URL
harbor_api_base_url.description: Override the Harbor API base URL (defaults to the public testnet endpoint).

tools.name: ping_harbor
tools.description: Check whether required Harbor credentials are present.

tools.name: list_spaces
tools.description: List your Personal and Team spaces.

tools.name: upload_file
tools.description: Read a local file, encrypt it with Seal, and upload it.

tools.name: download_file
tools.description: Download a file, decrypt it, and save it locally.

tools.name: list_files
tools.description: List files inside a specific bucket.

tools.name: get_file_status
tools.description: Check the processing state of an in-flight upload.

tools.name: delete_bucket
tools.description: Permanently delete a bucket and all its files.

tools.name: delete_file
tools.description: Permanently delete a single file from a bucket.
